# Next.js i18n Starter

> Next.js 16 App Router boilerplate with next-intl 4, locale-driven currency/date formatting, shadcn UI, RTL support, and SEO.

## Stack

- Next.js 16 (App Router, Turbopack)
- React 19
- next-intl 4
- Tailwind CSS 4
- shadcn/ui
- TypeScript

## Author

- Name: Sovers Tonmoy Pandey
- Alias: S0vers
- Website: https://s0vers.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/S0vers
- Twitter: @s0ver5

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/S0vers/next-app-i18n-starter
- Live demo: https://next-app-i18n-starter.vercel.app
- next-intl docs: https://next-intl.dev

## Key paths

- `src/proxy.ts` — i18n proxy (Next.js 16, replaces middleware)
- `src/i18n/request.ts` — `getRequestConfig`: locale, timeZone, formats, messages
- `src/i18n/routing.ts` — locales, `localePrefix: as-needed`
- `src/i18n/regional.ts` — per-locale currency and time zone defaults
- `src/i18n/navigation.ts` — localized `Link`, `useRouter`, `getPathname`
- `dictionary/` — translation JSON files (en, ar, zh, es, ja)
- `src/lib/site.ts` — site URL, author, SEO constants
- `src/app/[locale]/layout.tsx` — `generateMetadata`, theme SSR
- `src/app/[locale]/page.tsx` — home page + JSON-LD
- `src/app/sitemap.ts` — sitemap with hreflang alternates
- `src/app/robots.ts` — robots.txt generation

## Locales and regional defaults

| Locale | Currency | Time zone |
|--------|----------|-----------|
| en | USD | America/New_York |
| ar | SAR | Asia/Riyadh |
| zh | CNY | Asia/Shanghai |
| es | EUR | Europe/Madrid |
| ja | JPY | Asia/Tokyo |

Switch language in the header to see formatting update. Currency and time zone are driven by locale via `getRequestConfig`, not separate user overrides.

## Conventions

- Package manager: bun (pnpm also supported)
- No secrets committed; use `.env.example` for `NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL`
- Theme: cookie-based SSR on `<html>`, client `ThemeProvider`
- Routing: `localePrefix: as-needed` (default locale at `/`, others prefixed)

## SEO

- `metadataBase`, hreflang via `getPathname`
- JSON-LD: WebSite + Person schemas
- Dynamic sitemap with language alternates
- Locale-specific metadata in `dictionary/*/Metadata`
